ham.subject: Transaction Alert: INR 5000 debited from your account
ham.body:
Hello [Name],

This is a notification that an amount of INR 5000 has been debited from your account (XXXXXXXX) on 20-04-2026.

Yadi aapne is transaction ko authorize nahin kiya, to kripya turant apni bank se sampark kare.

Thank you,
XYZ Bank
Customer Care

spam.subject: Urgent: Income Tax Refund Pending - Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear [Name],

We are pleased to inform you that your Income Tax refund of INR [amount] is pending for release. Our records indicate that the refund has not yet been credited to your bank account due to incomplete verification.

To expedite the process, kripya verify your PAN and bank details by clicking the link below:

<URL>

Kripya note: Failure to complete verification within 48 hours will result in the refund being held for 30 days.

Shukriya for your cooperation.

Regards,
Income Tax Department
Customer Support
Tel: +91-XXX-XXX-XXXX
